label: Stat part (room stat)
description: Scales the stat based on a room statistic such as impressiveness or cleanliness.

Class.label: Class
Class.description: C# StatPart type used by RimWorld DirectXmlLoader for this list item.

priority.label: Priority
priority.description: Sort order among stat parts. Higher values execute later.

roomStat.label: Room stat
roomStat.description: RoomStatDef whose value is used to scale this stat.

customLabel.label: Custom label
customLabel.description: Override label shown in the stat explanation for this part. Marked [MustTranslate].
